subject: Spire peak chamber diameter
fact: The chamber at the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is 60 feet in diameter.

subject: Teleportation circle diameter
fact: The permanent teleportation circle at the peak is 20 feet in diameter.

subject: Portal recalibration duration
fact: Recalibrating the teleportation circle requires ten rounds of intense concentration.

subject: Combat round status
fact: The session ends on round 4 of the combat.

subject: Remaining combat rounds
fact: There are 6 rounds remaining before the portal is fully recalibrated.

subject: Glyph-Warded Corridor length
fact: The Glyph-Warded Corridor is 50 feet long.

subject: Vault of Oaths dimensions
fact: The Vault of Oaths is a 30-by-30-foot chamber.

subject: Vault temperature
fact: The Vault of Oaths is kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.

subject: Limping Oric purchase price
fact: Limping Oric purchased a stolen artifact for 45 gold pieces.

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch sale price
fact: Felkur sold The Watcher's Eye Brooch to Limping Oric for 45 gold.
source_quote: sold to Limping Oric for 45 gold

subject: Glyph of Warding trigger condition
fact: Glyphs of Warding are placed on floor tiles corresponding to prime numbers.

subject: Spirit Guardians spell level
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians at fifth level.
